title: SearchAnalyticsRow
description: A single row of search analytics data. Contains dimension keys and their associated metric values.

keys.description: A list of dimension values for this row, in the same order as the dimensions specified in the request. For country, the value is a 3-letter country code. For device, the value is DESKTOP, MOBILE, or TABLET.

clicks.description: The number of clicks from Google Search results that landed on the property.

impressions.description: The number of times a link to the property appeared in search results and was seen by a user (not necessarily scrolled into view).

ctr.description: Click-through rate: the ratio of clicks to impressions, expressed as a decimal between 0 and 1.

position.description: The average position of the property in search results, where 1 is the topmost position. The value is averaged across all queries and pages.
